original: A squad of elite nyrean huntresses are circling around you, each carrying a long spear and wearing primitive banded armor over her chain bikini-wear. They’re each wearing a long cape around their shoulders, displaying a blood red sigil that looks like some combination of a woman and a tentacle monster. The guardswomen move with trained rigidity, attacking you from one side, then the other, probing your defenses. They don’t let up - somebody’s always jabbing at you with a spear or trying to grab you, making you defend from every direction at once!
just barely notice another nyrea attempting to stab you in the back. You quickly spin around and shove her back, preventing the attack.
fail to notice one of their sisters behind you grabbing a dagger and leaping to attack you, sinking the dagger into
You manage to grab her spear before it can hit you, and you quickly snap the head off, tossing the poison aside.

You try and dodge, but her sisters give you no room to maneuver; you end up getting sliced by it! Hissing with pain, you recoil and grab your bloodied [pc.skinNoun]... and quickly begin to feel the poison boiling through you, making your body burn with unbidden arousal.
The chemical in your blood is getting stronger!
You dodge out of the way, narrowly avoiding a crushing blow.
You don’t manage to dodge in time, and get a thunderous wallop on the head for your trouble! You stagger back, clutching your aching head.
